summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with production experience building LLM-powered agents, workflow automations, and API-driven systems. Shipped an agentic AI interview platform using Anthropic Claude with automated document ingestion, multi-turn conversation orchestration, and post-session evaluation pipelines, and a production RAG developer assistant using LangChain, OpenAI, and Pinecone with webhook-driven CI/CD deployments. Proficient in TypeScript and Python, experienced integrating AI systems with third-party APIs and async workflows, and comfortable driving adoption by communicating technical solutions clearly to non-technical stakeholders.

skills.languages: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar), C++ (familiar)
skills.ml: LLMs, Agentic Workflows, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Prompt Engineering, HuggingFace Transformers, NLP, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
skills.infra: RESTful APIs, Webhooks, API Integration, FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
